name: Rolf Liebermann
abstract: Rolf Liebermann (14 September 1910 – 2 January 1999), was a Swiss composer and music administrator. He served as the artistic director of the Hamburg State Opera from 1959 to 1973 and again from 1985 to 1988.

works_created.t: Suite on Six Swiss Folk Melodies
Concerto for Jazz Band and Symphony Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Avakian George
about_quotes.evidence: The only previous one, I think, was by Rolf Liebermann, the Swiss composer, and frankly it’s not all that good. Teo’s is better.
about_quotes.doc_title: Avakian George — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
